goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and excited about seeing local tourist attractions.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'north' and should be in the type of 'mutliple sports'.
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in 'the type of boat'.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'entrance fee', and 'address'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should be in the 'moderate' price range.
The hotel should be 'in the same area as the attraction'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel' and 'whether they have free parking'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and excited about seeing local tourist attractions
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the north and should be in the type of mutliple sports
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in the type of boat
Make sure you get phone number, entrance fee, and address
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the moderate price range
The hotel should be in the same area as the attraction
Make sure you get star of the hotel and whether they have free parking
